ddls:
CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the platform (e.g., Twitter, StockTwits) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the device (e.g., iPhone, Web) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "screen_name" TEXT /* Screen name of the user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user (if available) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user (if available) */,
  "follower_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers of the user */,
  "following_count" INTEGER /* Number of users followed by the user */,
  "account_creation_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the post */,
  "favorited" INTEGER /* Whether the post is favorited */,
  "favorite_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the post is favorited */,
  "reply_to_sn" TEXT /* Screen name of the user being replied to */,
  "created" TEXT /* Date and time the post was created */,
  "truncated" INTEGER /* Whether the post is truncated */,
  "reply_to_sid" TEXT /* ID of the status being replied to */,
  "id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the post */,
  "reply_to_uid" TEXT /* ID of the user being replied to */,
  "status_source" TEXT /* Source of the post (e.g., Twitter for iPhone) */,
  "screen_name" TEXT /* Screen name of the user who created the post */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the post is retweeted */,
  "is_retweet" INTEGER /* Whether the post is a retweet */,
  "retweeted" INTEGER /* Whether the post is retweeted by the current user */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the user's location (if available) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the user's location (if available) */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the post (positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the platforms table */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the devices table */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the companies table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the hashtag */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the posts table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mentions" (
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mention */,
  "screen_name" TEXT /* Screen name of the mentioned user */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the posts table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_tags" (
  "post_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post tag */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the posts table */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag assigned to the post (e.g., earnings, product launch) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_tags_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)
